AppDescription: MQTT uplink monitor + pluggable payload decoders + sensor visualization + RadioBridge configuration/downlinks + cloud integrations. Import gateway JSON history on uplinks page.
AppVersionNotes: Uplinks: Import history — upload gateway JSON to merge packets into cache (table, decode, export). Removed SQLite/storage; uplink cache is IndexedDB only. Cleanup: GPT, tools_downlinks redirect, bar-chart icon, orphan NetworkDashboard mqtt_utils/config.
